Q2 Not checked
General Aptitude • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

The number 12375 is divisible by

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, c)
1 + 2 + 3 + 7 + 5 = 18, hence divisible by 3 and 9 both.
Again (5 + 3 + 1) – 7 + 2 = 0
Hence, divisible by 11 also.

Q3 Not checked

Not attempted

The total number of integral values of x for which |||x – 2|–4|–6|< 10.

Correct answer: A
Solution

Since a modulus value is always non-negative, therefore

Thus there are total 39 values of x, namely –17, –16, . . . . –2, –1, 0, 1, 2, .... 20, 21
Hence choice (a) is the correct one.

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
∠BDC = 180° – (110° + 30°) = 40°
and ∠BAC = ∠BAC = 40°
(angles of the same segment)

Q9 Not checked
General Aptitude • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Read the passage carefully and choose the best answer to the following question from the four alternatives given below.
Among the natural resources which can be called upon in national plan for development, possibly the most important is human labour; without productive labour force, including effective leadership and intelligent middle management, no amount of foreign assistance or natural wealth can ensure successful development and modernisation. One essential factor is usually overlooked or ignored. The forgotten factor is the role of women. Development will be handicapped as long as women remain second-class citizens, uneducated, without any voice in family or community decisions, without legal or economic status, married when they are still practically children, and thenceforth producing one baby after another, often only to see half of them die before they are of school age. We can enhance development by improving ‘woman power’ by giving women opportunity to develop themselves.
The most important natural resource for national development is

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
The passage clearly states that among natural resources, human labour is the most important for
national development.

Q10 Not checked
General Aptitude • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

He likes to drive his car at a speed of eighty kilometres each .

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
The correct expression is “eighty kilometres an hour” (or per hour). The word “each” is grammatically incorrect in this context. “Correct sentence: “He likes to drive his car at a speed of eighty kilometres an hour.”

Q44 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

An electrodynamometer wattmeter is used for measurement of power in a single-phase circuit. The load voltage is 100 V and the load current is 9 A at a lagging power factor of 0.1. The wattmeter voltage circuit has a resistance of 3000 Ω and an inductance of 30 mH. The current coil has a resistance of 0.1 Ω and negligible inductance. The frequency is 50 Hz. The percentage error in the wattmeter reading when the pressure coil is connected on the supply side is _____ %.

NAT
Correct answer: 12.1
Solution

When the current coil is on the load side, the wattmeter measures the power in the load plus the power loss in the current coil.
